actions.title: Fix review-prs.sh PATH and label creation
actions.plan:
1. Add PATH export for /opt/homebrew/bin at top of review-prs.sh
2. Create 'reviewed-by-claude' label in both repos via gh
3. Verify the script completes a full cycle
4. Truncate the spammy review.log
actions.spawn_prompt:
Fix the broken review-prs.sh automated PR review system at /Users/hurin/.openclaw/monitor/review-prs.sh.

Root cause: cron doesn't have /opt/homebrew/bin in PATH, so `gh` and `claude` commands fail.

Steps:
1. Edit /Users/hurin/.openclaw/monitor/review-prs.sh — add this line after `set -euo pipefail`:
   export PATH="/opt/homebrew/bin:$PATH"

2. Create the label in both repos:
   cd /Users/hurin/.openclaw/workspace-hurin/theapp/btcopilot && gh label create 'reviewed-by-claude' --description 'PR has been reviewed by Claude' --color '7057ff'
   cd /Users/hurin/.openclaw/workspace-hurin/theapp/familydiagram && gh label create 'reviewed-by-claude' --description 'PR has been reviewed by Claude' --color '7057ff'

3. Truncate the spammy log: > /Users/hurin/.openclaw/monitor/review.log

4. Do a dry run to verify the script works: bash /Users/hurin/.openclaw/monitor/review-prs.sh --dry

5. Check that the dry run log shows 'Would review PR #X' or 'No open PRs' instead of 'Creating label'.

Also verify that `which claude` works from the script's PATH context — the review step calls `claude -p` which also needs to be in PATH.

Success criteria: review-prs.sh --dry completes without errors and logs actual PR review activity for both repos.
actions.success_metric: review-prs.sh --dry completes and logs PR review status for both btcopilot and familydiagram repos

actions.title: Clear stale active-tasks.json
actions.plan:
1. Write empty tasks array to active-tasks.json
2. This does NOT remove the T7-4 worktree (Patrick needs to review those changes first)
actions.spawn_prompt:
Clear the stale active-tasks.json that still shows a failed T7-4 task.

Write this content to /Users/hurin/.openclaw/workspace-hurin/theapp/.clawdbot/active-tasks.json:
{"tasks": []}

Do NOT remove any worktrees — the T7-4 worktree has uncommitted changes that need human review.

Success criteria: active-tasks.json contains empty tasks array.

actions.title: Close ancient PR btcopilot#10
actions.plan:
1. Close btcopilot PR #10 with comment explaining it was superseded by FD-300 (PR #11, merged Dec 2025)
2. Delete the branch if possible
actions.spawn_prompt:
Close the stale PR #10 in btcopilot repo.

cd /Users/hurin/.openclaw/workspace-hurin/theapp/btcopilot
gh pr close 10 --comment 'Closing: superseded by FD-300 (PR #11, merged Dec 2025). The synthetic user generator was fully implemented in that PR.'
gh pr view 10 --json headRefName --jq '.headRefName' | xargs -I {} git push origin --delete {} 2>/dev/null || echo 'Branch already deleted or protected'

Success criteria: PR #10 shows as closed.
